title: Kaizen Casa Wooden Mortar and Pestle Garlic Masher Hand Grinder Crusher Kitchen Gadgets
description:
About this item
a perfectly designed efo Pestle Mortar Set is great for grinding whole spices into a powder, also good for making small batches of puréed garlic, ginger, and other ingredients.
Traditional design: Grind, powder or shred herbs, ingredients for sauces, mixtures, spices, salt, pepper, garlic cloves, nuts, saffron strands, etc.
Just toss in a few cloves or pieces, smash them up, and you're done. Widely used in pharmacies and apothecaries, small Mortars and Pestles will help you powder pills, for optimal ingestion, or hide them in your stubborn pet’s kibble. Must-have cookware for every household!
It is recommended to hand wash and dry it before putting it away.
Dimension : Mortar- 4" x 3" Pestle- 5.5"
reviews_5s:
It looks cute and works decent for herbs. If you have harder herbs tho, I'd go for a harder material than this tho. But this one's a great product and it's lasted a few years of wear at this pointVery well made. Easy to use. Love the craftsmanship and design on the front.This item showcases superb workmanship, and the intricately carved design is skillfully executed. Personally, I utilize it for grinding dried herbs. However, caution is advised against washing this wooden piece, as it comprises three sections fused together for the bowl. Water exposure could lead to wood expansion, potentially disrupting or widening the joins. Instead, I recommend wiping it with a dry or very slightly damp cloth when needed. Additionally, be mindful of using it for highly pungent ingredients, considering wood's porous nature that may absorb odors. Its aesthetic appeal makes it suitable as a standalone decorative accent on an altar or shelf.Worked well for a potion set I bought my daughter. I wanted some more accessories to go with it.I've seen a lot of reviews stating that these don't clean well, the inside is unfinished and how it's an annoyance but that's the reality of a good wooden mortar and pestle

It's not like granite or other stones, no matter what you do, even if the wood was finished on the inside, it will easily grind away and wear off. You only want to clean wood with a damp towel and wipe it out otherwise you can cause it to swell and water log and once it dries out it will crack.

Overall, I use this for my chiles and other heated spices and have separate ones for baking and etc.

It works well but won't grind things into tiny flakes, you get more chunky flakes. Don't apply a ton of pressure otherwise you'll crack the wood.

Overall, a damn good pestle and mortar for the price it isThe workmanship is excellent, and the carved design well-executed. I use mine to grind dried herbs. I would not recommend washing this piece, as it is wood, and made by fusing 3 sections together for the bowl. So water would expand the wood, and widen or disrupt the joins. I would wipe it out with a dry or very very slightly damp cloth if necessary. I would also be careful using it to crush extremely pungent ingredients as wood is porous, and tends to absorb odors. It is attractive as a stand alone decorative accent on an altar or shelf as well.Great product I use it to grind my pets monthly chewable so it can be mixed with something so she will eat it.Está hecho muy artesanal muy buena calidad de maderaLove this. I use it for grinding all my herbs and it's beautiful.I absolutely love this wooden mortar and pestle set! It is just as it shows in the pictures, smooth, sturdy and just beautiful. It is a gift for my daughter, and I know she will love it.
reviews_1s: moldy after washingI have this a while but noticed it had tiny holes in it. It is not stained. I found one bug , in there and kept finding sawdust on the whole cup. U definitely could not use it for anything that I bought it for. It is designed well and would definitely purchase again if they could solve the bug issues . I can’t return it now, I just hope they don’t spread to my other wood such as my antique dressers. I’m going to try and stain it don’t know if it will help or not.Well on the 3rd use it completely fell apart -- came unglued. Never touched by anything wet, it succumbed to the naturally pressure used to process dry herbs 😢Now it's a useless piece of firewood.🔥It cracked in less than two weeks! It’s always been hand-washed and as durable as it looks, it’s garbage.En la imagen se veia mas grande por eso lo pedi, pero es muy pequeño lo pondre de adorno porque para hacer mofongo no me servira ):have you had any complaints about something being in the wood? For the second time I have found wood that is very fine on the counter. I wiped the counter clean and now have more on the cou. Something is eating the wood from the inside the bowl.Looked really nice when I got it and when I looked inside I noticed it looked like it was either used or poorly made. When I tried to clean it the rag looked like the picture. Pretty nasty looking. Don’t waste your money on this junk, spend a little more money and buy something better than this. Absolute garbage!!Has a couple big cracks. The inside has saw dust and is not finished. The product is a useless piece of junk!First of all, it is not very sturdy. It's light and made of wood. I don't like it at all.Its pretty but the star is no pentagon it’s just a regular star so yeah 1 star cuz of that
